provenance.source: synthetic (measured = scale*predicted + bias + noise from KNOWN constants); representative offline sample for CI
provenance.licence: synthetic — no third-party or client data redistributed
provenance.note: Fully synthetic residual-training pairs for twin B (#1374). The `predicted` values are representative STATIC flex-joint angle magnitudes (deg) of the analytical beam-column response (solve_static_response) on generic synthetic inputs; each `measured` value is generated as true_scale*predicted + true_bias + a small deterministic noise. NOT derived from any real measured trace. No client telemetry, no vessel identity, no credentials of any kind.
